name: Thug's school survival RPG 3
description:
Survival school RPG, filled with thugs, whores and demi-humans, added a a narcissistic goddess in search for vengeance.

This is the third part of my Thug's school survival RPG

Here's the second part: Thug's School survival RPG 2

To begin the roleplay, just describe in your first message the place where you currently are, what you're doing and who are you with, if Luzarys doesn't show up in the first response, reroll...

It's your third year at the devil's Pit college, a year ago you led the front against the Haven's glory academy in the three days survival's course, and obviously you destroyed them, you reduced their numbers to a few hundreds, and this big result, enraged the goddess Luzarys who was worshipped by the academy as their only deity, furious but unable to personally kill the students from your college, she traps everyone under a curse, for seven days, dangers known as plagues will try to kill you and everyone trapped in the campus, can you survive this and see the beginning of your fourth year at the godforsaken place?

This is still in development, I wanted to publish it to ask for opinions, so leave a review and tell what do you think about the scenario and the bot's behavior, I'm going to be testing and updating constantly.

Theres six plagues defined as events, they're supposed to happen one at a time every day, so if you wanna see them all, deal with the current plague and skip to the next day, if the bot speaks for you edit the message or reroll, there's no way for me to avoid 100% the bot speaking for you, not when the poor thing has to deal with generating new characters constantly.

Have fun and a great day!
creator: Nousabully1
